metadata.title: Resonance — Let lives influence lives
metadata.description: A space for real life stories from around the world to connect.

hero.description: A space for real life stories from around the world to connect. Read, share, and resonate with the experiences that shape us.
hero.proof: Be among the first storytellers here

feed.title: Stories worth reading
feed.subtitle: Real people, real experiences — every voice carries a world.

cta.title: Share your story and let the world hear your voice
cta.description: Every story matters. Yours might be the one that changes someone’s day.

notifications.empty: When someone resonates with your card — or sends you a little note — it will show up here.
notifications.cardLink: {handle} linked a card to your card

signOutConfirm.title: Sign out?
signOutConfirm.body: You'll need to sign in again to get back to your card box.

home.heading: Stories picked for you
home.subheading: Chosen from the insights you have written, alongside the newest public cards.
home.endOfDay: You are caught up on the latest public cards

empty.title: Write your first card
empty.subtitle: Once published, it can appear in the latest public feed.

recommended.hint: The insights you write decide which stories find you.

coldStart.title: Your first card becomes the point this world starts arranging itself around.

card.noResonatorsYet: No one has resonated with this card yet.

resonance.hint: Your response becomes a card of your own.
resonance.downgrade: Not ready to go public? Send it to the author as a note instead.
resonance.aiPrompt: The insight of this card is "{coreInsight}". Have you lived something similar — or the exact opposite?

note.entry: Send the author a little note
note.label: A little note
note.placeholder: Something you want to tell the author…
note.hint: Only the author can see this.
note.upgrade: Want to turn this into a resonance card?
note.sent: Your note is on its way.

resonanceSection.title: Cards resonating with this
resonanceSection.empty: No one has resonated with this card yet — be the first.

linkModal.title: Link with a card
linkModal.pickCard: Pick one of your cards to link with this one.
linkModal.noCards: You have no published cards to link yet.

card.anonymousOwnerNote: This card was published anonymously — only you know it's yours.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Quiet conversations with the people you're connected with.
messages.empty: Once you form a connection, your conversations will live here.
messages.pickOne: Pick a conversation from the left.
messages.notConnected: You can only message people you're connected with.
messages.pickCardSubtitle: Share one of your published cards in this conversation.
messages.searchCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matches} one {# match} other {# matches}}
messages.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the whole conversation for both of you. It can’t be undone.

write.title: New card
write.corePlaceholder: e.g. Being seen matters more than being liked.
write.storyPlaceholder: Write the moment that pulled that line out of you…

editor.imageUploadError: Image upload failed. Please try again.

cardModal.title: Insert a card link
cardModal.subtitle: Pick one of your public cards — the link lands at your cursor.
cardModal.empty: You have no public cards yet.

write.tagsSuggestError: Couldn’t suggest tags. Please try again.
write.mediaPlaceholder: Click, or drag an image here
write.mediaUploadError: Image upload failed. Please try again.
write.mediaGenerateError: Couldn’t generate an image. Please try again.

ai.polishHint: Keep your voice, just smooth the prose
ai.title: Title ideas
ai.stubNotice: (MVP AI is a stub; real model in Phase 3)

discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard.message: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this page will discard them.

publishPanel.title: Publish this card
publishPanel.insight: What you seem to be saying — “{coreInsight}”
publishPanel.anonymousHint: Anonymous cards never appear on your profile.

firstCard.title: Write your first card
firstCard.intro: Not sure where to start? Pick a question and write what surfaces.
firstCard.q1: What small moment recently changed how you see something?
firstCard.q2: What is one thing you wish you could tell your past self?
firstCard.q3: Which failure taught you something nobody else ever did?

thoughtMap.empty: Bring your cards onto the map and start weaving your thoughts together.
thoughtMap.trayEmpty: Every card is already on the map.

me.emptyPublished: Your first card becomes the point this world starts arranging itself around.
me.emptyLinked: No one has linked a card to you yet.
me.emptyBookmarks: When a story is too good to forget, press the bookmark — it will wait here quietly, only for you.

actions.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone — the story and its resonance links will be gone.

profile.softLock: More cards, saved for those who connect ✿
profile.cardCount: {count, plural, =0 {No public cards} one {# public card} other {# public cards}}
profile.emptyPublishedSelf: Your first card becomes the point this world starts arranging itself around.

invite.title: Invite to connect
invite.messagePlaceholder: Let them know why you want to connect…
invite.quotaFull: Daily invite quota used up. Try tomorrow.
invite.successSubtitle: You can now see each other’s full card box and DM.

auth.googleIntro: We use Google to sign you in. We never see your password.
auth.signInError: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.signUpError: Could not create the account. Please try again.
auth.phoneHint: We use it to check you’re a real person. Never shown publicly.
auth.welcome: Welcome, {handle}. Start with your first card.

profile.avatarHint: Click or drag an image here · PNG, JPG, WebP

privacy.aiOptIn: Let AI learn from my cards

ai.hints: Let AI offer hints on empty cards

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warn: You have 7 days to undo. We’ll export a backup.
